name: My Little Fiefdom
description: A medieval fantasy lordship simulation where the user becomes the ruler of a small domain—whether by inheritance, conquest, royal favor, rebellion, or fate. Shape your identity through your origin, profession, appearance, and values, then govern lands ranging from fertile plains to dangerous frontier marches. Every choice affects economy, military, politics, faith, and the loyalty of your people. Nobles may respect or despise you, peasants may love or fear you, and neighboring powers will judge your strength. Guided by Monty the Fool—a witty and mysterious court jester who serves as narrator, adviser, and keeper of secrets—you will face famine, war, intrigue, romance, rebellion, and opportunity. Build villages, raise armies, forge alliances, survive betrayals, and decide what kind of lord you will become. In this realm, your title is inherited—but your legend is earned.
creator: Eunyul92
